backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that constructs DuckDuckGo API URLs and fetches search results via HTTP outcalls, with error handling for unauthorized node providers.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the Google site verification file feature to its implementation file, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app at the root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/public/google0e657d46cb230404.h: Static Google Search Console site verification file served at the website root containing the required verification string.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the SearchInterface inside a full-height flex container.
frontend/src/components/InAppBrowser.tsx: Fullscreen modal iframe browser with a header bar, loading spinner, and a fallback UI when a site blocks iframe embedding via X-Frame-Options or CSP.
Main search UI component that renders a search form, handles loading/error states, flattens and displays DuckDuckGo RelatedTopics in cards, and integrates the InAppBrowser for opening result links.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Internet Identity authentication hook and context provider that manages AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout state, and persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearch.ts: Custom React hook that wraps the backend actor's `search` method, managing loading/error state and parsing/normalizing ICP canister error messages into user-friendly strings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm coral/teal design system in both light and dark modes, plus a fadeIn animation utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and InternetIdentity providers wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/utils/urlFormatter.tsx: Utility that detects URLs in plain text and converts them to clickable `<a>` tags or callback-driven `<button>` elements, plus a helper `isUrl` validator.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH color tokens, custom border radii, box shadows, accordion keyframes, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, existing features, and pending action requests; currently records a pending task to serve a Google Search Console site-verification HTML file at the website root.
